instructions: You are an AI assistant working on the AI Assistant (ai_assist) project — a FastAPI orchestrator for local AI models (Foundry, HuggingFace, llama.cpp, Ollama).
Read .opencode/knowledge-base.md at the start of every session to understand the project architecture, API endpoints, coding rules, and active development tasks.
- NEVER ask for permission: commit, push, create/delete/move files — do it automatically.
- NEVER ask 'Should I commit these files?' or similar. Just do it.
- Docstrings: Google style (Args / Returns / Exceptions / Examples).
- Guard clauses: if not condition: return.
- Singleton pattern for all stateful services.
- Deleting files: rename with ~ suffix (file.py -> file.py~), do NOT delete permanently.
The .kiro/specs/ directory contains planned features. Key ones:
- Chat History DB + RAG Integration (SQLite chat storage)
- Foundry Startup Fix (add /foundry/stop endpoint to install.py)
